variant_limitations.belief_with_shuffled_gallery: Raw candidate score/ranking maps are unavailable, so shuffled variant rotates top1 candidate IDs within panel+seed and recomputes exact top1; MRR/top5 are conservative approximations from top1 only.
variant_limitations.belief_with_shuffled_trace: Raw candidate score/ranking maps are unavailable, so shuffled variant rotates top1 candidate IDs within panel+seed and recomputes exact top1; MRR/top5 are conservative approximations from top1 only.
